data.name: Scarlett Steele: Viral Temptation
data.detailed_description:
Introducing Scarlett Steel: Viral Temptation, an electrifying Adult Visual Novel that breaks new ground!

Prepare yourself for a thrilling journey into the enticing realm of espionage, where heart-pounding pornographic encounters, intricate twists, and unforgettable romance await!

Slip into the role of Agent Scarlett Steele, a captivating secret agent navigating a world of intrigue and deception. Your choices dictate her path as she uncovers hidden agendas, forms unexpected alliances, and faces the repercussions of her decisions. With each move, weigh the risks and rewards carefully—will you trust your instincts, charm your way through, or rely on your expertise to outwit your enemies? In this gripping adventure, every decision shapes Scarlett's fate, leading to thrilling twists and turns you won't see coming.

Are you prepared to guide her through the shadows and determine her ultimate destiny?

WHAT TO EXPECT?

We want to make sure that playing as Scarlett Steele isn't just about sex.

At VenusVision Studio, we've put a lot of effort into ensuring you'll have a great time. Whether you're seeking quick stress relief or, as true visual novel enthusiasts, looking to dive deep into a story, we've got you covered. Our game is designed to keep you hooked, even if you're playing with just one hand! It's a visual novel that's full of surprises, keeping you on the edge of your seat.

So get ready for an exciting adventure with Scarlett Steele, where every decision you make counts!

IS THERE ANY CENSORSHIP?

No need to worry about censorship with Scarlett Steele: Viral Temptation.

We're delivering the full experience without any cuts or patches. It's all there for you to enjoy exactly as we intended. This game falls into the adult genre, and we've packed it with content we know fans will love.

So, dive in and experience everything we have to offer without any limitations.

EXTRA INFORMATION

Join our Discord to find all the ways you can contribute to the game's development. Your insights are crucial, and we look forward to your active participation in shaping the game! Your feedback is incredibly valuable to us. We also encourage you to wishlist our game on Steam.

We appreciate your support!

data.short_description: Experience the seductive pull of temptation, deception, and the intoxicating allure of dangerous delights at every twist and turn! Immerse yourself in the world of espionage like never before. Slide into the sleek persona of Special Agent Scarlett Steele and engage in a gripping battle for freedom.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz 64-bit Intel or AMD compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.15 Catalina or above
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 or later
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz 64-bit Intel or AMD compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
